headline: Senate Passes Infrastructure Bill in Late-Night Vote
subtext: The 68–32 vote clears the way for $1.2 trillion in nationwide spending.

headline: The Quiet Return of Small-Town Newsrooms
subtext: As national outlets retreat from local coverage, a new generation of reporters is betting on hyper-local trust.
author: Maria Ontiveros

subtext: of Americans now get breaking news alerts directly from social apps rather than news websites, up from 19% in 2020.

headline: Entire Country [Goes Dark] After [[Power Grid]] Fails Without Warning
description: Millions left without electricity as engineers scramble to restore the national grid amid record-breaking summer heatwave.

headline: [India] Signs Historic [[$80 Billion]] Defence Pact With France
subtext: The landmark agreement covers fighter jets, submarines, and joint satellite systems over a 15-year timeline.

headline: [Chandrayaan-5] successfully lands near the lunar south pole, making India the [first nation] to achieve a soft landing in the permanently shadowed region

description: A [magnitude 6.4 earthquake] struck the capital region at dawn, damaging hundreds of structures and triggering nationwide emergency protocols.
